mapper.insert: INSERT INTO industry_keywords (keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata) VALUES (#{keyword}, #{category}, #{frequency}, #{confidence}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{metadata,typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler}) ON CONFLICT (keyword) DO UPDATE SET category = EXCLUDED.category, frequency = EXCLUDED.frequency, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata
mapper.select: SELECT id, keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata FROM industry_keywords WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY frequency DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata FROM industry_keywords WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = true ORDER BY frequency DESC, confidence DESC

SELECT id, keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata FROM industry_keywords WHERE keyword ILIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%' AND is_active = true ORDER BY frequency DESC, confidence DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO keyword_relationships (source_keyword_id, target_keyword_id, relationship_type, strength, co_occurrence_count, pmi_score, confidence_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM industry_keywords WHERE keyword = #{sourceKeyword} LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM industry_keywords WHERE keyword = #{targetKeyword} LIMIT 1), #{relationshipType}, #{strength}, #{coOccurrenceCount}, #{pmiScore}, #{confidenceScore}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (source_keyword_id, target_keyword_id) DO UPDATE SET relationship_type = EXCLUDED.relationship_type, strength = EXCLUDED.strength, co_occurrence_count = EXCLUDED.co_occurrence_count, pmi_score = EXCLUDED.pmi_score, confidence_score = EXCLUDED.confidence_score, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE kr.id = #{id}

SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE (sk.keyword = #{keyword1} AND tk.keyword = #{keyword2}) OR (sk.keyword = #{keyword2} AND tk.keyword = #{keyword1})

SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE sk.keyword = #{keyword} OR tk.keyword = #{keyword} ORDER BY kr.strength DESC, kr.confidence_score DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id ORDER BY kr.strength DESC, kr.confidence_score DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE kr.relationship_type = #{relationshipType} ORDER BY kr.strength DESC, kr.confidence_score DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sk.keyword) as total_keywords, COUNT(kr.id) as total_relationships, AVG(kr.strength) as avg_strength, MAX(kr.strength) as max_strength, MIN(kr.strength) as min_strength, AVG(kr.confidence_score) as avg_confidence, COUNT(DISTINCT sk.category) as total_categories FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE sk.is_active = true AND tk.is_active = true

WITH keyword_counts AS ( SELECT sk.keyword, sk.category, COUNT(*) as relationship_count FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id WHERE sk.is_active = true GROUP BY sk.keyword, sk.category UNION SELECT tk.keyword, tk.category, COUNT(*) as relationship_count FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id WHERE tk.is_active = true GROUP BY tk.keyword, tk.category ) SELECT keyword, category, SUM(relationship_count) as total_relationships FROM keyword_counts GROUP BY keyword, category ORDER BY total_relationships DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT category, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, AVG(frequency) as avg_frequency, AVG(confidence) as avg_confidence FROM industry_keywords WHERE is_active = true GROUP BY category ORDER BY keyword_count DESC

SELECT id, keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata FROM industry_keywords WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT kr.id, kr.source_keyword_id, kr.target_keyword_id, kr.relationship_type, kr.strength, kr.co_occurrence_count, kr.pmi_score, kr.confidence_score, kr.created_at, kr.updated_at, sk.keyword as source_keyword, sk.category as source_category, tk.keyword as target_keyword, tk.category as target_category FROM keyword_relationships kr LEFT JOIN industry_keywords sk ON kr.source_keyword_id = sk.id LEFT JOIN industry_keywords tk ON kr.target_keyword_id = tk.id ORDER BY kr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO industry_keywords (keyword, category, frequency, confidence, is_active, created_at, updated_at, metadata) VALUES
(#{keyword.keyword}, #{keyword.category}, #{keyword.frequency}, #{keyword.confidence}, #{keyword.isActive}, #{keyword.createdAt}, #{keyword.updatedAt}, #{keyword.metadata,typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonTypeHandler})
ON CONFLICT (keyword) DO UPDATE SET category = EXCLUDED.category, frequency = EXCLUDED.frequency, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata

INSERT INTO keyword_relationships (source_keyword_id, target_keyword_id, relationship_type, strength, co_occurrence_count, pmi_score, confidence_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{relationship.sourceKeywordId}, #{relationship.targetKeywordId}, #{relationship.relationshipType}, #{relationship.strength}, #{relationship.coOccurrenceCount}, #{relationship.pmiScore}, #{relationship.confidenceScore}, #{relationship.createdAt}, #{relationship.updatedAt})
ON CONFLICT (source_keyword_id, target_keyword_id) DO UPDATE SET relationship_type = EXCLUDED.relationship_type, strength = EXCLUDED.strength, co_occurrence_count = EXCLUDED.co_occurrence_count, pmi_score = EXCLUDED.pmi_score, confidence_score = EXCLUDED.confidence_score, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM industry_keywords WHERE frequency = 0 AND is_active = false
